summary: Field Monitor Phase 2 spoke deployment: implemented Fetcher (plain+proxied fetch, AbortController timeout, UTF-8 transcode, byte_limit), Parser Registry (KV lookup by domain::field_name, stored fn_body execution, FIELD_ABSENT vs EXTRACTION_FAILED), and Proxy Router (Neon read-only rate_state, sliding window rate check, KV egress path, rate_delta computation).

features: Stored parser fn_body execution via new Function()
FIELD_ABSENT when no parser or null result
Fallback to 'direct' egress when no KV entry

constraints_verified: Proxy Router does NOT write to Neon — read only: PASS
Parser function stored in KV as serialized fn_body string: PASS
No banned libraries: PASS (no beautifulsoup4, requests, lxml)

go_condition_status.deployment: PENDING — requires wrangler deploy with Cloudflare credentials
